item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Pet Insurance Standards
item.description:
👀 Federal Pet Insurance Standards

What

Federal pet insurance regulatory baseline in the 119th Congress addressing transparency and claim-process standards in the rapidly-growing pet-insurance market.

What it does

  • Standardized disclosure formats · claim-process timelines · cooperative-class pet-care infrastructure provisions.

Composes

#4 Household Concierge (pet care).

🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
